'''sazama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feaver|feaver]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feaver|feaver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sazama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæzæmæth|sæzæmæth]] || [[word:sæzæmæj|sæzæmæj]] || [[word:sæzæmæsh|sæzæmæsh]] || [[word:sæzæmæ|sæzæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazazamath|sazazamath]] || [[word:sazazamaj|sazazamaj]] || [[word:sazazamash|sazazamash]] || [[word:sazazama|sazazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazamath|sazamath]] || [[word:sazamaj|sazamaj]] || [[word:sazamash|sazamash]] || [[word:sazama|sazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazafmath|sazafmath]] || [[word:sazafmaj|sazafmaj]] || [[word:sazafmash|sazafmash]] || [[word:sazafmaf|sazafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sazamatha|sazamatha]] || [[word:sazamaja|sazamaja]] || [[word:sazamasha|sazamasha]] || [[word:sazamaka|sazamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sazamath|sazamath]] || [[word:sazamaj|sazamaj]] || [[word:sazamash|sazamash]] || [[word:sazama|sazama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sazamathal|sazamathal]] || [[word:sazamajal|sazamajal]] || [[word:sazamashal|sazamashal]] || [[word:sazamakal|sazamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sazamathatha|sazamathatha]] || [[word:sazamajaja|sazamajaja]] || [[word:sazamashasha|sazamashasha]] || [[word:sazamaka|sazamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sazamathan|sazamathan]] || [[word:sazamajan|sazamajan]] || [[word:sazamashan|sazamashan]] || [[word:sazamakan|sazamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sazamathaoro|sazamathaoro]] || [[word:sazamajaoro|sazamajaoro]] || [[word:sazamashaoro|sazamashaoro]] || [[word:sazamakaoro|sazamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
